subject: Fw: (no subject)
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From:J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To:jpm6929@aol.com
Sent: Mon, March 10, 2008 9:06:59 AM
Subject: Re: (no subject)


no I have not seen the office plans,, that is your responsibility, I am dismayed that you somehow think my time spent traveling and reviewing your ideas, are less valuable than your time. I think its in your interest to meet with me , as I have been requesting, I have never said you have done nothing. I said that it is incredible that you have reviewed plans with me that you yourself could not describe. I said that it is incredible that you have designed plans , that have no relation to the land limitations, and views,  ie. a house that faces the garbage dump. , I find it incredible that after every conversation that has been had since day one, the requirment was for your people to do the design on the island, and have places in shade and out of the wind.. that the designs have been done without even a site vist, by the firms you say you hired, that the terraces, were built directly into the wind, and that even in the last library rendition, no thought
 is given to either the wind or shade.  I have been promised landscape plans, master plan, nursery plans, spa plans,  spa details since last march, were never ever deliver,, i have asked in e mails at least 7 times.. Pilar said then why didn't you end it there, I reiterated , I think jp is talented and hoped that he would get quality people with experience to help.   AS you recall your spa plan, had the jacuszzi hanging into the theatre from the ceiling. I never said that was nothing done, I said it was a waste of my time and yours,, I have consistantly said and repeatedlast night that you are surrounded by incompetents.. Pilar told me that she heard me upset in the house one time.. she did not know that it was as a result of having after many discussions, the plans upside down, and the measurments, wildly  in error .  stairs that went off a cliff, , roads that went up the side of a cliff etc.  prepared by you staff. 


----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com; dkiesq@aol.com
Sent: Monday, March 10, 2008 2:01:37 AM
Subject: Re: (no subject)

Jerffrey, what happened to you? I thought that the seventh was important. Good news?
I think you didn't quite understand what Pilar said, I have never sent a bill for all the things that I have worked on, but that doesn't mean that I have done nothing as you often say.
I do agree that is an excellent idea that someone who understand all this design process can help giving a clear view on where we stand, it is obvious that we do not communicate. Even your last mail, with copy to your lawyer, makes me guilty of not putting a bedroom in the New Library, which you and I had eliminated, and anyone would know how easy would be to re-denominate the vestibule next to the bathroom as a bedroom... In any case that is what McGuire did on all the other drawings. I  was expecting perhaps a comment on the idea of keeping an office on the second floor,etc.
Regarding your question to Pilar who did what in Canada, is the same set up that I thought we had, I did the design and a Canadian firm did the construction and all the permitting, the engineering etc. (the equivalent to McGuire, with the difference that they could not alter my design with out my approval, I don't know if you have seen their version of your office building, is rather awful)
I will call you tomorrow evening, if it is not to late, if not Tuesday early morning. J.P.


-----Original Message-----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: Jpm6929@aol.com
Sent: Sun, 9 Mar 2008 8:18 pm
Subject: (no subject)


I just had a disturbing conversation with your wife,, i would appreciate a call, 
, she thought that I owed you money for spending time on guermante, hotel 
lambert, , the two projects of the architectural firm.. I suggested that we 
engage a third party to make an independent judgement , and she thought that was 
very unfair,  


________________________________
 Supercharge your AIM. Get the AIM toolbar for your browser.

-----Original Message-----
From: wlotree@comcast.net

Date: Sat, 12 Jan 2008 22:19:23 
Subject: FW: (no subject)


thought this would be interesting to you all. 
  -------------- Forwarded Message: -------------- 
From: NTBenson@aol.com 
To: undisclosed-recipients:; 
Subject: (no subject) 
Date: Sat, 12 Jan 2008 11:30:26 +0000 
 
This was sent to me.  Passing on as an FYI. 
  
"snopes.com < <> http://snopes.com/> "

Who is Barack Obama? 

Probable U. S. presidential candidate, Barack Hussein 
Obama was born in Honolulu, Hawaii, to Barack Hussein Obama, Sr., 
a black MUSLIM from Nyangoma-Kogel , Kenya and Ann Dunham, a white 
ATHIEST from Wichita , Kansas . 
Obama's parents met at the University of Hawaii . When 
Obama was two years old, his parents divorced. His father returned 
to Kenya . His mother then married Lolo Soetoro, a RADICAL Muslim from 
Indonesia.? When Obama was! 6 years old, the family relocated to 
Indonesia . Obama attended a MUSLIM school in Jakarta . He also 
spent two years in a Cath olic school. 
Obama takes great care to conceal the fact that he is a 
Muslim. He is quick to point out that, "He was once a Muslim, but 
that he also attended Catholic school." 
Obama's political handlers are at tempting to make it appear that? 
Obama's introduction to Islam came via his father, and that this
influence
was temporary at best. In reality, the senior Obama 
returned to Kenya soon after the divorce, and never again had any 
direct influence over his son's education. 
Lolo Soetoro, the second husband of Obama's mother, Ann 
Dunham, introduced his stepson to Islam. Obama was enrolled in a 
Wahabi school in Ja karta . 
Wahabism is the RADICAL teaching that is followed by the 
Muslim terrorists who are now waging Jihad against the western 
world. Since it is politically expedient to be a CHR ISTIAN when
seeking 
major public office in the United States , Barack Hussein Obama has 
joined the Trinity United Church of Christ in an attempt to downplay
his
Muslim 
background. ALSO, keep in mind that when he was sworn into office he 
DID NOT use the Holy Bible, but instead the Koran. 
Let us all remain alert concerning Obama's exp ected 
presidential candidacy. 

The Muslims have said they plan on destroying the US 
from the inside out, what better way to start than at the highest 
level - through the President of the United States , one of their
own!!!! 
Please forward to everyone you know. Would you want this 
man leading our country?...... NOT ME!!! 
We need to do some DEEP research on this Trinity United Church of
Christ.
 
  
 


 
 
----------------
